zh.St. Mary Redcliffe, Bristol, Gloucester,: 英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾布里斯托 聖 瑪麗 雷可利福
zh.Wedmore, Somerset, England: 英國英格蘭薩默塞特維德莫
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Meade IV於大約1450年出生在英國薩默塞特維德莫時，他的父親Thomas Mede42歲，母親Margaret Raynes41歲。他與Johanna結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1504年在英國艾可可拉維林享年55歲。

nameMeanings.name: Meade
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: habitational name from Midheach, the Gaelic name of County Meath in Ireland. Its Anglicized forms are now indistinguishable from those of the English name Mead .

variants.name: Mead
meanings: topographic name for someone who lived by a meadow, from Middle English mede ‘meadow’ (Old English mǣd), or a habitational name from one or more of the many places so named, such as Meads in Harford (Devon).
perhaps from Middle English mede ‘mead, alcoholic drink of fermented honey and water’, possibly denoting one who was fond of the drink or who made or sold mead. Compare Meader .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Meade IV was born about 1450, in Wedmore, Somerset, England, his father, Thomas Mede, was 42 and his mother, Margaret Raynes, was 41. He married Johanna. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1504, in Clavering, Essex, England, at the age of 55.

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Meade IV(이)가 대략 1450년 영국 서머세트 w드모어에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Mede(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Raynes(은)는 41세였다. 그는 Johanna(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1504년 영국 에세스 클레이버링에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.
